stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Which shows an Omni Bearing Indicator (OBI) and a Direction Indicator (DI) from the cockpit of a light aircraft. The VOR in question is tuned and identified and is showing as 6 NM away. In which direction is the VOR from the aircraft?

options.a: Behind and to the left of the aircraft.
options.b: Behind and to the right of the aircraft.
